nasb.text: When he had begun to settle them, one who owed him ten thousand talents was brought to him.

esv.text: When he began to settle, one was brought to him who owed him ten thousand talents.

cnv.text: 剛算的時候，有人帶了一個欠下六千萬銀幣的人來。

ccb.text: 正开始清算的时候，有人带着一个欠了六千万银币的人进来。

csbs.text: 他开始算的时候，一个欠了一千万两银子的奴仆被带到他面前。
